title: Entity Service
text: Entity Service Specifies the signature of the Entity Service component that will handle data access. Applicable only if Database Access is Y (Via Entity Service). Applies to Entity Related Links Data Access Defines how an entity will access the data store—via a database path, or via an entity service. Entity Services Entity services implement simple business rules upon a single entity. They hide business logic and database access from the visible presentation component, acting as an intermediary component between the entity and the database. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
